FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NAD I ASTROLOGY 87
i. Venus is 7th from Jupiterand Moon,
ii. Jupiter and Moon aspect towards interchange Mercury.
Hence the native enjoys more than 2-3 degrees/academic
qualifications, besides possessing research mindedness.
Native will be highly educated, besides involving herself in
Reserch Field pertaining to food Technology and such allied
lines.
